title: Bhimakali Temple
tagline: Bhimakali Temple — spiritual town of Himachal Pradesh

overview.short: Bhimakali Temple is a Hindu temple at Sarahan in Himachal Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Bhimakali Temple is a Hindu temple at Sarahan in Himachal Pradesh, India. The temple is dedicated to the goddess Bhimakali, the presiding deity of the rulers of the former Bushahr state. The temple is situated about 180 kms from Shimla and it is considered as holy as 51 Shakta pithas.

topPlaces.name: Sarahan
topPlaces.description: Sarahan is a small town in Himachal Pradesh, India. It is the site of the Bhimakali Temple, originally known as Bhimadevi Temple (Bhīmā Kālī), dedicated to the mother goddess Bhimakali, presiding deity of the rulers of the former Bushahr State.

topPlaces.name: Bushahr (princely state)
topPlaces.description: Bushahr, also spelt as 'Bashahr' and 'Bussahir' or 'Bushair' was a Rajput princely state in India during the British Raj. It was located in the hilly western Himalaya promontory bordering Tibet.

items.note: Sarahan is a small town in Himachal Pradesh, India. It is the site of the Bhimakali Temple, originally known as Bhimadevi Temple (Bhīmā Kālī), dedicated to the mother goddess Bhimakali, presiding deity of the rulers of the former Bushahr State.
Bushahr, also spelt as 'Bashahr' and 'Bussahir' or 'Bushair' was a Rajput princely state in India during the British Raj. It was located in the hilly western Himalaya promontory bordering Tibet.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhimakali Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhimakali Temple is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bhimakali Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kullu-Manali Airport (Bhuntar) (73 km) and the nearest railway station is Chandigarh Railway Station (131 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhimakali Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhimakali Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhimakali Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Bhimakali Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhimakali Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sarahan, Bushahr (princely state).
